languages.text: Архимилитант Иждриг Батошски погиб через несколько лет службы от руки одного из собственных лучших офицеров, истово верующего и заподозрившего Иждрига в скрептицизме относительно священных Имперских доктрин.
After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.
languages.original_text: Архимилитант Иждриг Батошски погиб через несколько лет службы от руки одного из собственных лучших офицеров, истово верующего и заподозрившего Иждрига в скрептицизме относительно священных Имперских доктрин.

traits.locale_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.
After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.
After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

languages.text: 数年の勤務の後、アーチ・ミリタント・イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは、聖なる帝国の教義に対する疑念を疑う、彼の最高の将校の一人によって殺害された。
languages.original_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

traits.locale_text: 数年の勤務の後、アーチ・ミリタント・イズドリーグ・バトシュスキーは、聖なる帝国の教義に対する疑念を疑う、彼の最高の将校の一人によって殺害された。

languages.text: 服役几年后，首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基死在了他手下最优秀的一名军官手里。这名军官是一个虔诚的信徒，他怀疑伊兹德里格对神圣的帝国教义心存质疑。
languages.original_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

traits.locale_text: 服役几年后，首席战士伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基死在了他手下最优秀的一名军官手里。这名军官是一个虔诚的信徒，他怀疑伊兹德里格对神圣的帝国教义心存质疑。

languages.text: Après plusieurs années de service, l'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski périt sous les coups de l'un de ses meilleurs officiers, un fervent croyant qui le soupçonnait de scepticisme vis-à-vis de la doctrine impériale sacrée.
languages.original_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

traits.locale_text: Après plusieurs années de service, l'archimilitant Izdrig Batoshski périt sous les coups de l'un de ses meilleurs officiers, un fervent croyant qui le soupçonnait de scepticisme vis-à-vis de la doctrine impériale sacrée.

languages.text: Tras años de servicio, el Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski murió a manos de uno de sus mejores oficiales, un creyente devoto que sospechaba que Izdrig era escéptico de la doctrina imperial.
languages.original_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

traits.locale_text: Tras años de servicio, el Archimilitante Izdrig Batoshski murió a manos de uno de sus mejores oficiales, un creyente devoto que sospechaba que Izdrig era escéptico de la doctrina imperial.

languages.text: Birkaç yıllık hizmetin ardından Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski, kendisinin kutsal İmparatorluk doktrinine şüpheyle yaklaştığından şüphelenen dindar bir inanan olan en iyi subaylarından birinin ellerinde can verdi.
languages.original_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

traits.locale_text: Birkaç yıllık hizmetin ardından Başmilitan İzdrig Batoshski, kendisinin kutsal İmparatorluk doktrinine şüpheyle yaklaştığından şüphelenen dindar bir inanan olan en iyi subaylarından birinin ellerinde can verdi.

languages.text: Nach mehreren Dienstjahren starb Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski durch die Hand eines seiner besten Offiziere, eines frommen Gläubigen, der Izdrig Skeptizismus hinsichtlich der heiligen imperialen Doktrin unterstellte.
languages.original_text: After several years of service, Arch-Militant Izdrig Batoshski died at the hands of one of his finest officers, a devout believer who suspected Izdrig of scepticism about sacred Imperial doctrine.

traits.locale_text: Nach mehreren Dienstjahren starb Erzmilitant Izdrig Batoshski durch die Hand eines seiner besten Offiziere, eines frommen Gläubigen, der Izdrig Skeptizismus hinsichtlich der heiligen imperialen Doktrin unterstellte.
